title: ‘The best camera to ever exist’: Artemis II crew to study the Moon's surface mainly with their eyes
summary_full: Nasa's Artemis II astronauts are two-thirds of the way to the Moon, using their own eyes as the "best camera" to observe its surface. The four-member crew will conduct a lunar fly-around, capturing images and noting subtle color and texture changes. This historic mission marks the first crewed journey to the Moon in over 53 years.
